lesson.subtitle: Aula 12 -- Closing the Deal -- Review & Consolidation 2
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rafael de Andrade Brandão | Aula 12 -- Closing the Deal

listenings.text: Hi Rafael, this is Diana from Costa Logistics. We met on Wednesday afternoon, as we scheduled, and the meeting was great. I am ready to close the deal and sign the agreement for the pro plan. I have one last question about the terms. If we sign a two-year contract, will you give us a better discount? Our budget is tight this quarter, so the price is important for us. Also, we need a clear warranty, because the system must be reliable for our operations. If you can include free installation, we are going to sign today. Please send me the final agreement, and I will review the terms with my team. I think this is going to be a strong partnership. Thank you for your patience during the whole process. I look forward to closing the deal with you.

Hi, this is Rafael. I just finished the final meeting with Diana, and I have good news. She is going to sign the agreement for the pro plan today. We negotiated the terms together. She asked for a better discount on a two-year contract, so I offered ten percent and free installation. If she signs today, we will start the project next week. I explained the warranty clearly, because reliability is her main concern. The deposit is twenty percent, and she accepted it without a problem. I am going to send the final agreement this afternoon, and she will review the terms with her team. This is the biggest deal of the quarter for us. I am very proud of the whole team. We worked hard, and now we are going to close it.

extra_audio.text: Diana meets Rafael on Wednesday to discuss the final agreement. She asks for a better discount on a two-year contract. Rafael offers ten percent and free installation, and he explains the warranty. Diana accepts the terms and the deposit. Finally, they sign the agreement and close the deal.
